channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sequential compared to upfront treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer using oxaliplatin (Eloxatin) therapy may lead to similar outcomes
item.description: 1. Sequential and upfront treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC) with oxaliplatin (OX)-based therapy does not lead to significantly differen...

item.title: Fear memories fade faster when brain immune cells engage key neurons, study suggests
item.description: Post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) and anxiety disorders are often characterized by fearful responses in specific situations that the mind learns t...

item.title: Ultraprocessed Food Intake Tied to High Asthma Risk in Kids
item.description: High consumption of heavily processed foods is linked to an increased risk for asthma in young children during early school years. Medscape Medical Ne...

item.title: Low PSA May Not Fully Predict Survival in Prostate Cancer
item.description: A recent post hoc analysis assesses whether PSA changes can predict survival outcomes in patients with metastatic or very high risk nonmetastatic pros...
